content.en:
After Ye Tian returned to the Battle Ancestor Realm, his body began to impact the extreme realm of the Eternal Immortal Holy Body.

The copy body has already raised the Eternal Immortal Holy Body to the extreme realm, and it is naturally countless times easier for the main body to raise the Eternal Immortal Holy Body to the extreme realm.

So as soon as he heard the body, he began to attack the extreme realm of the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, and it didn't take long for the shackles to be broken.

The human world.

Ye Tian had already raised the Eternal Immortal Holy Body to the extreme realm at this time, and then he went into retreat again.

Although he had already cultivated the Eternal Immortal Holy Body to the extreme realm, he still needed to stabilize this realm.

If it is not well stabilized, then there will be a little problem with the foundation of the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, he broke through to this realm in the battle before, not only did he not consolidate it in time, but he also continued to fight with the Qingyang Domain Ancestor, causing problems with the Eternal Immortal Holy Body.

However, it is a copy of the body, and it doesn't matter how much you toss, but the body can't toss.

In the blink of an eye, tens of thousands of years had passed, and at this time, Ye Tian had completely stabilized the Eternal Immortal Holy Body.

"The Eternal Immortal Holy Body has been secured, and it's time for the replica body to hand over the ice crystal yacon to the body. "

However, Ye Tian's copy body was not ready to return to the Xuanxu Saint Realm, he wanted to continue to keep this copy body in the Battle Ancestor Realm to cultivate.

If the duplicate body does not return to the Xuanxu Holy Realm, how to hand over the ice crystal yacon fruit to the main body?

Ye Tian had already thought of a way, and that was to enter the Battle Realm Tower.

The Battle Realm Tower can connect the Dark Sacred Realm and the Xuanxu Sacred Realm, as long as Ye Tian's copy body and body enter the Battle Realm Tower at the same time, they can see each other, so that the ice crystal yacon fruit can be handed over to the main body.

Next, Ye Tian went to the Battle Realm Tower, the Battle Realm Tower was not in the War Ancestor Realm, because there were too many cultivators in the Dark Sacred Domain who needed to enter the War Realm Tower, so naturally it could not be set up in the War Ancestor Realm, otherwise wouldn't it be necessary to open the War Ancestor Realm and let countless outsiders enter?

The War Boundary Tower is set up in a giant city far away from the War Ancestor Realm, this giant city is called War Boundary City, which belongs to the War Gate.

War Boundary City is not a city-level power, it is just a city dedicated to exchange and trade.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the Battle Boundary City.

After entering the Battle Realm City, Ye Tian directly entered the Battle Realm Tower.

At the same time, Ye Tian's body also came out of the human realm and directly entered the battle realm tower of the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

Inside the War Tower.

Ye Tian's body saw his copy body, and the copy body handed over the ice crystal yacon fruit to the body, and immediately separated.

After Ye Tian's body obtained the ice crystal snow lotus fruit, he left the Battle Realm Tower and returned to the human realm.

The human world.

"I wonder how much this ice crystal yacon can increase my soul holy light?"

Ye Tian was very curious about this.

Immediately, he swallowed the ice crystal snow lotus fruit in one gulp, and began to refine the Endless Domain Method.

Bang!!!!

The energy of the ice crystal snow lotus fruit exploded directly into Ye Tian's soul, refining Ye Tian's soul, allowing Ye Tian's soul to continuously transform into soul holy light.

"What a terrifying ascension speed. "

Ye Tian was shocked.

Ye Tian then continued to operate the Endless Domain Method to refine his soul, and with the help of the ice crystal snow lotus fruit energy, Ye Tian's soul holy light continued to grow.

Time passed day by day, and tens of thousands of years passed in the blink of an eye.

At this time, Ye Tian had already thoroughly refined the ice crystal yacon fruit.

"Compared to the past, my soul light has increased by more than 10 times. "

Ye Tian was shocked by the effect of the ice crystal yacon fruit.

Compared to the Ice Crystal Yacon Fruit, the effect of the Soul Saint Realm Flower is quite average.

I have to say that this time it was undoubtedly a great opportunity to obtain the Ice Crystal Snow Lotus Fruit from the Ghost Fox Organization, otherwise, relying on his own cultivation, I don't know how many years it would take to grow the soul holy light to such a level as it is now.

Ye Tian's soul holy light had increased by 10 times, and his own combat power had increased by at least several times.

If Ye Tian fought against the Qingyang Domain Ancestor with his current combat strength, then he could easily defeat the Qingyang Domain Ancestor.

But even so, Ye Tian's soul holy light was still very far away from condensing the holy soul.

After all, Ye Tian's soul was very powerful, far surpassing the ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestor, so if he wanted to transform all his souls into soul holy light, it would take more time, and the difficulty would naturally be greater.

But once Ye Tian completely condensed the Holy Soul, then his strength would also reach an incomparably terrifying level.

On the other hand, a Holy Soul-level Supreme Domain Ancestor like the Qingyang Domain Ancestor was just a relatively ordinary Holy Soul-level Supreme Domain Ancestor.

Dark Sanctuary, Battle Ancestral Realm.

Ye Tian's copy body continued to cultivate here, often entering one cultivation treasure after another.

Copying the body also does not need to enhance the soul holy light, only the cultivation of the holy technique time fragment.

Ye Tian's time fragment holy technique has only barely been promoted to the consummation realm now, and it is still far from the extreme realm!

If you cultivate in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, your cultivation speed is naturally far inferior to when you were in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, but if you cultivate in the Battle Ancestor Realm, you can enter many cultivation treasure lands, and your cultivation speed is naturally very fast.

Therefore, he will leave the copy body in the War Ancestor Realm and enjoy the resources of the War Ancestor Realm, so as to raise the holy skill of Time Fragment to the extreme realm.

The following days were very dull, Ye Tian continued to cultivate the Soul Holy Light, but unfortunately the Soul Saint Realm's help to him became smaller and smaller, maybe it would not be too long, and the Soul Saint Realm would not be of much help to him.

At that time, he must enter other Soul Saint Realms or rely on other opportunities to accelerate the cultivation of Soul Holy Light.

Otherwise, he was afraid that it would take an endless number of years to condense the Holy Soul.

Just like many supreme domain ancestors in the War Ancestor Realm, they have been cultivating for endless years, and relying on the resources of the Battle Gate, they still can't condense the Holy Soul, and they don't even know how many years it will take.

Is there a shortage of resources in the battle gate?

Many, on the contrary, many, far beyond the ordinary forces.

It's a pity that many of the resources of the Battle Gate can't be regenerated, and many opportunities are gone after they are used up once, and if they are apportioned, there is no way to cultivate many Supreme Domain Ancestors with Holy Souls.

Therefore, Ye Tian didn't expect Zhanmen to help him condense the Holy Soul, he still needed to rely on himself.

"I can only look forward to the birth of some opportunities in the Xuanxu Holy Realm that can help me quickly condense the Holy Soul!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

this day.

Another holy relic was born in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and the grade of this holy relic is okay, although it is not as good as the holy relic list, but it is much better than the ordinary holy relic.

In the following years, almost every 100,000 years, a holy relic would be born in the Xuanxu Saint Realm, which shocked many domain ancestors.

But most of the holy relics fell into Ye Tian's hands, and he would not dislike the lack of his holy relics.

Before you know it, thousands of years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had a feeling that the Xuanxu Saint Realm would be born next!
